data.title: FanttikRide N7 Pro Electric Wiggle Car with Pedal, Rechargeable Battery, CyberWiggle, 2 in 1 Swing Car, 2 Speeds Max 4 Mph, A

features: 360° Control and 2-in-1 Swing Car: The electric swing car benefits from a steering wheel with integrated smooth bearings and swivel wheels capable of 360° steering
allowing you to have fun indoors and outdoors. Electric mode: turn on the power switch and press the pedal
or manual mode: just turn the steering wheel or slide with your feet to take you to a pleasant riding experience
2 Speeds and Anti-Rollover: 12V battery and 45W powerful motor
max. 4 mph

feel the speed and passion brought by the kids electric car. You can be adjusted to a low speed mode of 1.9 mph through the plug-in button on the bottom of the toddler electric car. Pyramid-style double triangular anti-tip chassis
upgraded anti-tip rear wheels and its spring shock system
effectively avoiding sideways tilting
Flashing Wheels and Bluetooth: When you slide on the wiggle car with pedals
the front light guide you forward
and the magnetic flash wheels flash with colorful lights. Light up PU wheels no batteries needed
provide shock absorption
glide smoothly and do not scratch the floor. Connect to Bluetooth to freely adjust the volume and songs
adding fun to your child's driving experience
Suitable for Children: Electric wiggle car stimulate child's imagination and hands-on ability
and also cultivate children's hand-eye coordination
sense of balance. The ergonomically designed extra-large seat can accommodate two kids. This ride-on toy suitable for heights up to 69 inches
weight capacity of up to 150 pounds
so even adults can experience the fun of little ones
Easy to Install and Special Choice: Just two steps
you can quickly finish the installation of the motorized wiggle car. This innovative ride-on car is suitable for boys and girls aged three and up
making it a choice for birthdays
holidays
or any special occasion
Tips for Extending Battery Life: To maximize battery life for your ride on wiggle car
store it in a cool
dry place
and remember to charge your device regularly to avoid completely draining it. Keep your battery healthy and enjoy a longer product experience

relatedProducts.Title: Gotrax WG1 Electric Wiggle Car for Kids, 12V Big Battery up to 120Min Playtime, Music Speaker &Rear Flash Wheels, Battery Dis
relatedProducts.Features: Fun for Kids: The electric wiggle car's 360° swivel wheels enable sharp turns and drifts while building balance! Features built-in songs / music speaker 2 modes. Freely adjust volume and songs and switch modes for extra riding excitement! | Long-Lasting 12V Battery: Powered by a 12V safe lead-acid rechargeable battery, this ride on toy provides up to 120 minutes of continuous ride per charge under 110lbs load( the lighter the longer playing time). Quick-replace design for easy battery swaps. | Anti-Slip Safety & 2.5MPH Max Speed : The triangle anti-roll chassis, upgraded anti-roll rear wheel, effectively prevents side tilt. 12V battery and 30W powerful motor, maximum speed 2.5mph, feel the speed and passion of the wiggle car. | Easy 5 Minute Assembly: 1, Attach the Handlebar–Secure it to the front with screws; 2, Install the rear wheel set–Fix it to the base with screws; 3, Connect the Wires–Plug the wheel's wire into the motor adapter cable. It is ready for fun in minutes! | Light-Up Rear Wheels: The colorful flash LED lights boost fun, making rides more exciting. Kids love the vibrant glow, enhancing engagement. The wiggle car model is WG1, and it was authorized by the FCC, with an FCC ID of 2AWFV-WG1
